title: The RealReal Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2021 Results
text: The RealReal announced Q4 2021 and full year 2021 results. Q4 2021 GMV growth of 45% year-over-year. Full year 2021 gross merchandise value (GMV) increased 50% compared to 2020. Q2 2021 showed the company's highest quarterly gross merchandise volume (GMV) to date, increasing 91% year-over-year. Q3 2021 GMV increased 50% compared to Q3 2020. Strong top-line growth with significant operating expense leverage demonstrated throughout the year. The company reported continued momentum in both consignment and direct-to-consumer channels, with strong buyer engagement and repeat purchase rates. Management emphasized the resilience of the luxury resale market and the success of platform initiatives in unlocking supply and enhancing customer experience.
